fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-6 at ~80% participation; Nethermind storage-read disagreement on revert being investigated
devnet-7 target: early next week; Prysm/Nimbus/Lodestar passing tests, Teku updating branch (end of day), Grandine ready in a few days
Tony's block-access-list change (EIP-11902) agreed to include in devnet-7; EL test release to be tagged by end of day
Public/Mekong-style devnet for Gloas app testing targeted for early August; repricings cited as key driver
Hegota non-headliner EIP submission window closes August 6; same process as announced on ACDE

epbs_updates.highlight: Produce Block v4: blinded execution payload for stateful flow being removed; adds complexity, minimal performance gain; approvals received
Beacon API PR #625 (ProduceBlock v4 POST with per-builder auth/config): urgent feedback needed from staking pools, builders, DVT providers, and VC tooling

ePBS circuit breakers: Teku and Lodestar implemented builder-index-aware ban/unban logic; Prysm plans trusted-builder fallback before local building to prevent sybil attacks on P2P bids; document forthcoming

eip8282_builder_contracts.highlight: EIP-8282 builder deposit/exit contracts finalized; audit pending; builder exit queue disabled pre-fork, re-enabled post-fork; EIP language needs updating to reflect CREATE2 deployment

documentation.highlight: EIP housekeeping: PRs open to move Glamsterdam EIPs from draft to review; EIP-7723 DFI-removal timing and core-EIP-only staging scope need clarification (PRs #11006, #11853)

action_items.action: Tag and release EL test release including Tony's block-access-list change by end of day
Provide feedback on Beacon API PR #625 (ProduceBlock v4 auth config) urgently
action_items.owner: Staking pools (Lido, Rocket Pool), builders, DVT providers, VC tooling teams

action_items.action: Update EIP-8282 language to reflect CREATE2 deployment method

decisions.decision: Tony's block-access-list EIP change included in devnet-7 (not deferred to devnet-8)
devnet-7 confirmed to include progressive containers
Blinded execution payload removed from Produce Block v4 stateful flow; PR to be polished and merged
Public Gloas app-testing devnet targeted for early August
